ddls:
CREATE TABLE "options_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each options data entry */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the options data entry */,
  "call1" REAL /* Premium price for the first call option */,
  "call2" REAL /* Premium price for the second call option */,
  "put1" REAL /* Premium price for the first put option */,
  "put2" REAL /* Premium price for the second put option */,
  "callstrike" REAL /* Strike price for the call options */,
  "putstrike" REAL /* Strike price for the put options */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the financial instrument */,
  "expiry" TEXT /* Expiry date of the options */,
  "callone" REAL /* Premium price for the call option at 100% strike */,
  "putone" REAL /* Premium price for the put option at 100% strike */,
  "callhalf" REAL /* Premium price for the call option at 50% strike */,
  "puthalf" REAL /* Premium price for the put option at 50% strike */,
  "volume_call1" INTEGER /* Volume of trades for the first call option */,
  "volume_call2" INTEGER /* Volume of trades for the second call option */,
  "volume_put1" INTEGER /* Volume of trades for the first put option */,
  "volume_put2" INTEGER /* Volume of trades for the second put option */,
  "open_interest_call1" INTEGER /* Open interest for the first call option */,
  "open_interest_call2" INTEGER /* Open interest for the second call option */,
  "open_interest_put1" INTEGER /* Open interest for the first put option */,
  "open_interest_put2" INTEGER /* Open interest for the second put option */,
  "iv_call1" REAL /* Implied volatility for the first call option */,
  "iv_call2" REAL /* Implied volatility for the second call option */,
  "iv_put1" REAL /* Implied volatility for the first put option */,
  "iv_put2" REAL /* Implied volatility for the second put option */,
  "last_trade_time_call1" TEXT /* Last trade time for the first call option */,
  "last_trade_time_call2" TEXT /* Last trade time for the second call option */,
  "last_trade_time_put1" TEXT /* Last trade time for the first put option */,
  "last_trade_time_put2" TEXT /* Last trade time for the second put option */,
  "bid_price_call1" REAL /* Bid price for the first call option */,
  "bid_price_call2" REAL /* Bid price for the second call option */,
  "bid_price_put1" REAL /* Bid price for the first put option */,
  "bid_price_put2" REAL /* Bid price for the second put option */,
  "ask_price_call1" REAL /* Ask price for the first call option */,
  "ask_price_call2" REAL /* Ask price for the second call option */,
  "ask_price_put1" REAL /* Ask price for the first put option */,
  "ask_price_put2" REAL /* Ask price for the second put option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_options_data_expiry FOREIGN KEY ("expiry") REFERENCES options_expiry ("expiry_date"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_options_data_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the financial instrument */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the financial instrument */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of the financial asset (e.g., stock, ETF, index) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial instrument */,
  "issuer" TEXT /* Issuer of the financial instrument */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the financial instrument */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the financial instrument */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the financial instrument */,
  "previous_close" REAL /* Previous day's closing price */,
  "last_traded_price" REAL /* Last traded price */,
  "last_traded_time" TEXT /* Last traded time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "options_expiry" (
  "expiry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expiration date */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date of the options expiration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expiration date (e.g., monthly, weekly) */,
  "is_weekly" INTEGER /* Indicates if the expiration is weekly */,
  "is_monthly" INTEGER /* Indicates if the expiration is monthly */,
  "is_quarterly" INTEGER /* Indicates if the expiration is quarterly */,
  "is_yearly" INTEGER /* Indicates if the expiration is yearly */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expiry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the options data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES options_data ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the trading session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the trading session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trading session (e.g., open, closed) */,
  "trading_volume" INTEGER /* Total trading volume during the session */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of trades during the session */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price during the session */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the options data entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the data version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "version_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who made the version change */,
  "version_reason" TEXT /* Detailed reason for the version change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES options_data ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_version_by FOREIGN KEY ("version_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk metric */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the options data entry */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the risk metric (e.g., Delta, Gamma, Vega) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the risk metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date of the risk metric calculation */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the risk metric (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "metric_confidence" TEXT /* Confidence level of the risk metric (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_metrics_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES options_data ("id")
)
